import React,{useState} from 'react' import './booking.css' import tourData from '../../assets/data/tours' import {Form, FormGroup, ListGroup, ListGroupItem, Button } from 'reactstrap' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Booking = ({tour, avgRating}) => { const {price,reviews}=tourData; const navigate=useNavigate(); const[credentials, setCredientials]=useState({ userId:'01', // later it will be dynamic userEmail:'example@gmail.com', fullName:'', Mbno:'', guestSize:1, bookAt:'' }) const handleChange= e=>{ setCredientials(prev=>({...prev, [e.target.id]:e.target.value})) } const serviceFee=10; const totalAmount=Number(price)* Number(credentials.guestSize) + Number(serviceFee); //send data to the server const handleClick = e=>{ e.preventDefault(); navigate('/thank-you'); } return (

${price} /per person

{avgRating === 0 ? null :avgRating} ({reviews?.length})
{/* =========Booking form===================*/}
information
{/*======booking end==========*/} {/*=============booking bottom=======*/}
${price} 1 person
${price}
Service charge
${serviceFee}
Total
${totalAmount}
) } export default Booking
